references.title: How Zach King Gets Away With Doing Graffiti
references.why: Most-viewed Short ever; sub-1.5s visual pattern-interrupt with one invisible-cut reveal - the video IS the hook.

references.title: Dubai Chocolate at Home 🍫
references.why: Trend named in the first spoken second, word-pop captions on number words, cost-reveal loop ending.

references.title: I Disguised Fast Food as Homemade 🤫
references.why: First-frame stakes, beat-per-sentence jump cuts with pop-in captions, payoff-question ending for rewatch.

references.title: If Cleaning Was a Timed Sport. Part 2
references.why: Premise legible in one frame, relentless action-cut rhythm, timer-buzzer ending loops into the opening.

references.title: Magic BATTLE!
references.why: Trick-per-2s pacing with reaction cutaways; escalation structure - TikTok-native one-upping at its cleanest.

references.title: Sperm loses his way #shorts #YoutubePartner
references.why: Absurd costume pattern-interrupt inside 1s; single-scene sketch whose punchline re-arms the loop.

references.title: Would You Fly To Paris For A Baguette?
references.why: Title-question spoken as the literal first line; location-jump compression; ending answers the opening - closed loop.
